property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Master Mode Cycle | Flight Control" Cycle into SCM mode.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Modifier | Modifier" Pop mode stack -- return to the prior active mode.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Master Mode Cycle | Flight Control" Cycle into SCM mode.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Modifier | Modifier" Hold-only Modifier mode (chord layer). Reverts on release.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Master Mode Cycle | Flight Control" Cycle into Nav mode.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Modifier | Modifier" Hold-only Modifier mode (chord layer). Reverts on release.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Reset Freelook | Camera" Recenters freelook: holds F4 + the freelook vJoy button for 0.5s, then releases.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Cycle to Auxiliary Mode | Miscellaneous" Cycle into Aux mode.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Routed to mouse Y, not vJoy -- lets you tilt the camera in 3rd-person while flying.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Camera Tilt (Mouse Y) | Camera" Routed to mouse Y so you can free-look up/down while flying in 3rd person.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Routed to mouse X, not vJoy -- lets you pan the camera in 3rd-person while flying.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Camera Pan (Mouse X) | Camera" Routed to mouse X so you can free-look left/right while flying in 3rd person.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Cycle to Auxiliary Mode | Miscellaneous" Cycle into Aux mode.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Light Amp Toggle | Miscellaneous" Clean 100ms tap on light-amp vJoy button. Activation-mode must stay "release" (not "both").

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: description
property.value: L-A1 [Modifier] (8-way hat) — up=Acc. Limiter Increase | down=Acc. Limiter Decrease Decrease Limiter Decrease Limiter | left=Set Limiter to SCM | right=Release Trim

property.name: description
property.value: R-A1 [Modifier] (8-way hat) — down=Thruster Cap Decrease/[H] Thruster Set to Min 1 | left=Weapon Cap Decrease/[H] Weapon Set to Min 1 | right=Shield Cap Decrease/[H] Shield Set to Min 1

property.name: description
property.value: Left stick axis 1 (passthrough to vjoy 1 axis 1)

property.name: description
property.value: Left stick axis 2 (passthrough to vjoy 1 axis 2)

property.name: description
property.value: L-T1 throttle wheel — Mining Throttle / Salvage Beam Spacing (vjoy 1 Rz)

property.name: description
property.value: Left stick axis 4 (passthrough to vjoy 1 axis 4)

property.name: description
property.value: Left stick axis 5 (passthrough to vjoy 1 axis 5)

property.name: description
property.value: Left stick axis 6 (passthrough to vjoy 1 axis 3)

property.name: description
property.value: Right stick axis 1 (passthrough to vjoy 2 axis 1)

property.name: description
property.value: Right stick axis 2 (passthrough to vjoy 2 axis 2)

property.name: description
property.value: R-T1 throttle wheel — Axis Unbound (vjoy 2 Rz)

property.name: description
property.value: Right stick axis 6 (passthrough to vjoy 2 axis 3)

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: cycle operator mode. Hold 0.5s: drop to SCM and toggle mining.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: cycle operator mode. Hold 0.5s: drop back to SCM.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: cycle operator mode. Hold 0.5s: switch to Nav mode.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: toggle freelook. Hold 0.5s: run Reset Freelook macro to recenter the camera.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: MFD quick-repair-all. Hold 0.5s: cycle master mode.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: MFD quick-repair-all. Hold 0.5s: drop to Aux and toggle mining.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: MFD quick-repair-all. Hold 0.5s: switch to Aux and set mining.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: ping radar. Hold 0.5s: light amp toggle (via macro -- SC needs a tap-shape, not a hold).

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Dock/Undock | Flight Control" Brief Right Alt+N tap (50ms chord) -- SC docking toggle
